query: Magnificent 7 tech companies (Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, Tesla) large acquisitions $10 billion or more announced or rumored in 2026, especially mid-2026. Any pending big M&A deals as of June-July 2026?
answer:
I've completed my research. Here's the key finding:

## Bottom Line

**As of June–July 2026, the only clearly pending $10B+ Magnificent 7 acquisition is Amazon's ~$11.6 billion acquisition of Globalstar** — announced April 14, 2026 and in active FCC review with a July 6, 2026 comment deadline. It would be Amazon's second-largest acquisition ever.

The other major $10B+ deals of 2026 have **already closed** and are therefore not "pending":
- **Google/Alphabet → Wiz ($32B)** — closed March 11, 2026 (largest deal in Google's history)
- **Nvidia → Groq (~$20B)** — an "acquihire" closed in early 2026

The **$40B Aligned Data Centers deal** is a consortium/infrastructure buyout (BlackRock, Microsoft, Nvidia, xAI, MGX) — Microsoft and Nvidia are minority participants, not sole acquirers.

**Notable smaller/rumored activity:** Meta unwinding its $2B Manus deal (China order), Meta's failed Kalshi acquisition talks (June 30), Tesla's ~$2B unnamed AI-hardware buy, and speculative Tesla/SpaceX merger chatter — all sub-$10B or not corporate acquisitions.

**Context:** Big Tech M&A is at a **decade low by deal count** despite record ~$725B AI capex in 2026. The giants are prioritizing infrastructure spending and minority AI stakes (e.g., Meta's $14.3B Scale AI investment) over large buyouts. The biggest *pending* tech/media megadeals of 2026 are **not** Mag 7 deals (Netflix-WBD ~$83B, PIF/Silver Lake-EA ~$55B, Charter-Cox ~$34.5B).

Full structured findings with all data points and sources have been recorded.

sources.title: FCC Kicks Off Review of Amazon/Globalstar Deal
sources.snippet: The FCC has kicked off its review process for Amazon's acquisition of Globalstar, seeking comment by July 6. Amazon moved in April to acquire Globalstar in a $10.8 billion deal.

sources.title: Amazon to buy Globalstar to bolster Leo satellite business in deal worth about $11.6 billion
sources.snippet: Amazon said it would acquire Globalstar for $90 a share, in a deal worth about $11.57 billion.

sources.title: Amazon to Acquire Apple's Globalstar Stake in Satellite Deal
sources.snippet: Amazon is acquiring Apple satellite provider Globalstar, and worked out a deal to take over Apple's stake.

sources.title: Google Completes $32 Billion Acquisition of Wiz
Alphabet Secures Unconditional EU Approval for Landmark $32 Billion Wiz Acquisition
sources.snippet: Unconditional antitrust clearance from the EU for its $32 billion acquisition of Wiz, finalized February 10, 2026.

sources.title: Nvidia's $20 Billion Groq Acquisition Just Paid Off
sources.snippet: Nvidia paid $20 billion in cash in late 2025 for the AI inference unit of chip start-up Groq.

sources.title: Nvidia's $20B Groq Acquisition: Why It Paid 2.9x Valuation for LPU Tech
sources.snippet: Updated with 2026 regulatory developments, including the formal Senate inquiry (Warren/Blumenthal, March 20, 2026) and FTC scrutiny of reverse acquihire structures.

sources.title: Warren, Blumenthal Question Whether NVIDIA's $20 Billion Groq Deal is Attempt to Avoid Antitrust Laws
BlackRock completes $40B acquisition deal for Aligned Data Centers
sources.snippet: A consortium led by BlackRock, alongside Microsoft and Nvidia, finalized a $40 billion acquisition of Aligned Data Centers.

sources.title: Consortium of BlackRock, Nvidia, Microsoft to Acquire Aligned Data Centers in $40 Billion Deal
sources.snippet: Consortium including BlackRock, Nvidia, Microsoft, xAI and MGX to acquire Aligned Data Centers, valued at $40 billion including debt.

sources.title: Q2 2026 Building, Backing, and Buying AI
sources.snippet: Big Five acquisition deals dropped to 7 in 2024, rose to 14 in 2025, and stood at 12 YTD 2026; Meta invested $14.3B in Scale AI; China ordered unwinding of Meta's $2B Manus deal.

sources.title: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing's demand
sources.snippet: Meta has begun dismantling its $2 billion acquisition of Manus after China issued a divestiture order.

sources.title: Meta was in talks to acquire Kalshi but deal fell apart
sources.snippet: Meta considered buying Kalshi before developing its own prediction market app.

sources.title: Tesla quietly discloses $2 billion AI hardware company acquisition buried in filing
sources.snippet: Tesla agreed to acquire an unnamed AI hardware company for up to $2 billion in stock and equity awards, per Q1 2026 10-Q.

sources.title: Elon Musk wants to merge SpaceX and Tesla into a $3.4 trillion giant
sources.snippet: CNBC reported May 27 that Tesla and SpaceX are weighing a merger.

sources.title: Upcoming M&A Deals: Mergers and Acquisitions Tracker
sources.snippet: Fifteen upcoming M&A deals for 2026-2027, led by Netflix's $83B WBD deal, $55B PIF/Silver Lake bid for EA, and Charter's $34.5B Cox merger.

sources.title: Big Tech AI Spending Tops $725 Billion: Free Cash Flow Hits Zero This Summer
sources.snippet: Combined 2026 spending across the four largest hyperscalers reached ~$725 billion, a 77% increase from $410 billion in 2025.

sources.title: Global M&A trends in technology, media and telecommunications: 2026 mid-year outlook
sources.snippet: Supersize M&A theme driven by AI scale dynamics; four companies expected to spend more than $700bn in 2026 on infrastructure.

sources.title: Breaking Down Amazon's Globalstar Acquisition
sources.snippet: Amazon's ~$11.6B Globalstar deal marks its second-largest acquisition ever, behind only the $13.7B Whole Foods purchase in 2017.

data_points.metric: Amazon acquisition of Globalstar (pending, equity value)
Nvidia acquisition of Groq inference unit (closed)
Aligned Data Centers consortium acquisition (Microsoft/Nvidia as participants)
Tesla acquisition of unnamed AI hardware company (max)
Meta minority investment in Scale AI (Series G, not acquisition)
Big Four hyperscaler AI capex 2026 (Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft)
